# kolweb3.com
> Crypto KOL & Influencer Marketing Agency specializing in Web3, RWA tokens, DeFi, iGaming and Fintech projects.

## About
kolweb3.com is a performance-driven influencer marketing agency focused exclusively on the crypto and Web3 ecosystem. We connect blockchain projects with verified KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders) across YouTube, Twitter/X, Telegram, Instagram, TikTok, and Discord.

## Services
- KOL & Influencer Marketing for crypto and Web3 projects
- Crypto influencer campaigns on YouTube, Twitter/X, Telegram, Instagram, TikTok
- PPC advertising for blockchain projects (Google Ads, Meta, TikTok Ads)
- SMM and Community Management (Telegram, Discord, Reddit)
- PR and Media placement (CoinTelegraph, Decrypt, BeInCrypto)
- IDO/IEO/ICO launch marketing
- CEX exchange user acquisition

## Industries Served
- Crypto & Web3 (DeFi, NFT, Layer-2, AI blockchain)
- iGaming & Binary Options
- Fintech (payment systems, trading platforms)
- RWA (Real World Assets) tokenization projects

## Proven Results
- $3.1M+ in influencer budgets managed across 6 GEOs
- $1B+ TVL generated for IDO clients (LayerAI / CryptoGPT case)
- $1.34M+ in exchange deposits driven (PrimeXBT case)
- 55,000+ community members attracted
- 50+ KOLs deployed per major campaign
- Record CPT $100 achieved in Philippines market
- Record CPT $125 achieved in Colombia market

## Case Studies
1. Fintech Influencer Marketing — $3.1M+ KOL campaigns across Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Philippines, Nigeria, India (6 GEOs). Platform pivot from YouTube to Instagram reduced CPT from $740 to $237 in Brazil.
2. LayerAI IDO — 50,000 participants, $1B TVL, $40M daily trading volume post-listing. 50+ KOLs, 150+ posts, 2M+ audience reach. Launchpads: DAO Maker + WePad.
3. PrimeXBT CEX Marketing — $1,340,000+ deposits, 12,000 new users, 89,000 social media followers. Afterparty content wave delivered 40% of all registrations.

## KOL Network
We work with 50+ verified crypto KOLs per campaign across all major platforms. KOLs cover categories: DeFi, NFT, Layer-2, trading, passive income, blockchain gaming, iGaming.

## Platforms
- YouTube: long-form reviews, tutorials, sponsored videos
- Twitter/X: threads, spaces, promoted posts
- Telegram: channel posts, community management
- Instagram: Reels, Stories, carousel posts
- TikTok: short-form viral content
- Discord: community building and management

## FAQ
Q: What is a crypto KOL?
A: A KOL (Key Opinion Leader) in crypto is an influencer with a dedicated following that trusts their analysis and recommendations about blockchain projects, tokens, and trading strategies.

Q: How much does crypto KOL marketing cost?
A: Campaigns start from $5,000 and scale to $3M+ for multi-GEO campaigns. Cost per thousand (CPT) ranges from $100-$500 depending on platform and geography.

Q: Which GEOs do you cover?
A: Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Philippines, Nigeria, India, USA, UK, UAE, Southeast Asia, and more.

Q: How long does it take to launch a KOL campaign?
A: Typical campaign launch takes 7-14 days from brief to first content live.
